about.title: About the Instructor
about.subtitle: Learn from an experienced educator
about.bio: With over 10 years of teaching experience, Ahmed has helped thousands of students master their craft through clear, structured, and practical lessons.
about.credentials: MSc Computer Science · 10+ years teaching · 5,000+ students
about.philosophy: My teaching philosophy centers on clarity, practice, and real-world application. Every lesson is designed to build on the last, creating a complete and coherent learning journey.

faq.items.workflow.q: What exactly will I learn in this course?
faq.items.workflow.a: You'll learn a complete 7-phase workflow: (1) Planning—turning ideas into PRDs and specs, (2) Design—creating UI direction before code, (3) Implementation—building phase by phase with focus, (4) Code Review—using AI for review and test generation, (5) Security & Performance—hardening before launch, (6) SEO & Marketing—tracking and discoverability, (7) Docker & Production—deploying live.
faq.items.prerequisites.q: Do I need to be an expert to take this course?
faq.items.prerequisites.a: No. The course is designed for beginners with a basic programming foundation through experienced developers looking to systematize their workflow. Each module explains concepts from the ground up.
faq.items.guarantee.q: What if I don't like the course or it doesn't work for me?
faq.items.guarantee.a: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you follow the workflow and complete the steps but still don't achieve your learning goals, request a refund within 30 days of purchase.
faq.items.lifetime.q: Will I have lifetime access to the course?
faq.items.lifetime.a: Yes. Pay once and get lifetime access to all course materials, recordings, and any future updates at no additional cost.
